productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men City Scape Green Flip Flops
description: adidas does not disappoint with these City Scape flip flops in bright green. With &ldquo pump&rdquo printed all over the footbed, it's reminiscent of BEP and the hip hop music style. Pair them with slim jeans and a bright tee. Upper Thick fabric and rubber thong straps with piping on edges for protection from abrasion and blistering Fabric toe separator for maximum comfort Soft foam footbed for all-day massage feel with graphics Outsole TPR outsole with geometric textured lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not machine wash
